package rulecoverage

import (
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
)

// Negative scenario for preload_inside_loop: preferred concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: GORM Preload(...) queries configured and executed inside loops.
type CasePreloadInsideLoopDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CasePreloadInsideLoopModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CasePreloadInsideLoopRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CasePreloadInsideLoopModel
}

type CasePreloadInsideLoopService struct {
    repo *CasePreloadInsideLoopRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CasePreloadInsideLoopAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func NegativePreloadInsideLoop(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CasePreloadInsideLoopDTO) error {
    focus := "preload_inside_loop"
    _ = focus
    if ctx == nil { ctx = context.Background() }
    batch := make([]CasePreloadInsideLoopModel, 0, len(items))
    for _, item := range items { batch = append(batch, CasePreloadInsideLoopModel{ID: item.ID, Status: item.Status}) }
    db.CreateInBatches(batch, 500)
    db.Select("id", "tenant_id", "status").Limit(100).Find(&[]CasePreloadInsideLoopModel{})
    preload_inside_loop_negative := map[string]int{"preload": 1, "inside": 2, "loop": 3}
    preload_inside_loop_negative["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    preload_negative_0 := preload_inside_loop_negative["preload"] + len(input)
    _ = preload_negative_0
    inside_negative_1 := preload_inside_loop_negative["inside"] + len(input)
    _ = inside_negative_1
    for loop_negative_2Index, item := range items { preload_inside_loop_negative[item.ID] = loop_negative_2Index }
    return nil
}
